commands.command: python3 -c "import html.parser; html.parser.HTMLParser().feed(open('app.html').read())" && grep -q 'executeGAS' app.html && grep -q 'GAS_URL' app.html && echo 'VERIFY_PASSED'
rg -n "if \\(tab === 'schedule'\\)|executeGAS\\(payload|献立スケジュールを読み込み中|onclick=\\\"assignScheduleRecipe|献立に追加" app.html
commands.result: schedule tab calls renderSchedule(); executeGAS(payload...) remains in syncPendingChanges, handleInit, and the non-tab-triggered loadSchedule function; recipe assignment is behind the 献立に追加 button
